Notice Of Motion To Amend Judgment By Interlineation
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SALLIE MAE INC., AS AGENT FOR HICA EDUCATION LOAN CORPORATION'S Motion To Amend Judgment By Interlineation.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/PHA/ju) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2005 Continued To Feb-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-13-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
George L. Cohn, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sallie Mae Inc., as agent for HICA Education Loan Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Ruth Hankins, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Loan 3,4,5 summary sheets -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Applications---------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Balace Sheets--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Juana A. Sainez as follows:
Damages $55,046.90
Prejudgment Interest $4,004.40
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $345.50, for a total of $62,221.80
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2005 Continued To Dec-30-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
